Auth.title: Sign in to your CFI Workspace account
Auth.terms: By continuing to use CFI Workspace, you agree to our <Link>Terms of Service</Link> and Privacy Policy.

Password.title: Please enter your password to sign in
Password.warningText: For security, we recommend using private browsing if you're on a shared or public device.

Recover.description: Enter your email or username and we'll send you a link to get back into your account.
Recover.heading: Recover your account

Reset.heading: Reset your password
Reset.helpText: Strong passwords combine uppercase and lowercase letters, numbers, and special characters.

Initialize.heading: Recovery Email Sent
Initialize.description: We've sent a recovery link to your email. Please check your inbox and follow the instructions to reset your password. If you don't see it, check your spam or junk folder.

PasswordUpdated.heading: Password Updated
PasswordUpdated.description: Your password has been successfully updated. You can now sign in using your new credentials.
